sentence.chinese: 山是獵人的大地，海是漁人的蒼天。山有情，海有義。山造就了勇士，海造就了能者。勇士之箭捕獲了獵物，能者之網捕獲了海中的魚。
sentence.ab: O omah no mi’adopay ko lotok, o kakarayan no mifotingay ko riyar. Ira ko faloco’ no lotok, ira ko moecel no riyar. O lotok ko palafa’inayay to tamdaw, o riyar ko patirengay to kiemelay no tamdaw. Citama’ ko pana’ no tadafa’inayan, pakaala ko salil no kiemelay a kapah to foting no riyar.

sentence.chinese: 習武的少年，在山中追逐，征服人性的懦弱。健美的少女，在海邊嬉戲，驅除心中的無情。山不孤單，海不寂寞。
sentence.ab: O mikontaway to tatirengan a pakarongay, malalaop i lotolotokan, a milowid to rarimaay no tamdaw. O tanohtohay ko tatirengan a limecedan, masasikemot i tafotafokan no riyar, a mifahfah to caedesay no faloco’. Caay ka’iwil ko lotok, caay katafihaw ko riyar.

sentence.chinese: 山是我們的寶藏，海是我們的冰箱。山有情，海有義。山使獵人有智慧，海使漁人聰明。
sentence.ab: O fodawan no mita ko lotok, o pinsiyang no mita o tamdaw ko riyar. Ira ko faloco’ no lotok, ira ko moecel no riyar. Pakacifenek ko lotok to mi’adopay, pakacipono’ ko riyar to mifotingay.

sentence.chinese: 習武的少年，在山中頓悟，健美的少女，在海中釋懷。山不咆哮，海不怒吼。山是我們的能量，海是我們的泉源。山是獵人的大地，海是漁人的蒼天。
sentence.ab: O mikontaway sato a pakarongay, talipaelal to i lotok, o tanohtohay a limecedan, matedal ko faloco’ i riyar. Caay pilekal ko lotok, caay kalaha’ ko riyar. O lotok sato o sakaci’icel no mita o tamdaw, o riyar sato nemnem no mita o tamdaw. O omah no mi’adopay ko lotok, o kakarayan no mifotingay ko riyar.

sentence.chinese: 山有情，海有義。曾幾何時？生活改變，文明向前邁進。人群人潮前往山中，邁向海洋遊玩。
sentence.ab: Ira ko faloco’ no lotok, ira ko moecel no riyar. Nai hacowa to hakiya? Masafaeloh ko saki’orip, macakat to tala’ayaw ko nika’orip. Masakapot, masafeleng ko tamdamdaw, pasayra i lotok a romakat, tayra i riyar mahaholol a mala’aning.

sentence.chinese: 山流淚，海哭泣。族人迷惘，族人失落。究竟為何？習武的少年在人山中流浪，健美的少女在人海中沉浮漂流。
sentence.ab: Talalosa’ to ko lotok, tomangic to ko riyar. Apa sato ko finacadan, awa ko palawinaan no finacadan. Masamaan to? O mikontaway a pakarongay rakarak sato i ’alomanay no tamdamdaw, o tanohtohay a limecedan pawpaw sato i ka’alomanan no tamdamdaw.

sentence.chinese: 先祖對山與海的呼喚，依舊未消失。美少年，美少女啊！記得歸來唷！當你仰望時，山依在，海在流。娜魯灣呀！山是我們的大地，依呀嗨啊！海是我們的蒼天。
sentence.ab: O pi’ang’ang no mato’asay to riyar ato lotok, matiya to na’ayawan ho kalasawad. Pakarongayaw, limecedanaw! Aka tawalen minokay haw! Yo mica’engaw kiso, matiya ho tomireng ko lotok, malecad ko likid noya riyar. Nalowanaw! O pala no mita ko lotok, iyahohayan! O kakarayan no mita ko riyar.
